_HOOKS_FORMAT_NOTE: Claude Code hooks REQUIRE the inner 'hooks' field to be an ARRAY of {type, command} objects. Do NOT put 'command' directly under the matcher — that causes an 'only accept array' validation error. See README section 'Hooks format (array required)' before editing.

hooks.command: bash -c 'echo "AI Designer loaded. Use design_discovery tool to start designing."'
bash -c 'echo "Design request detected. Consider using design_discovery first."'
